items.title: Enhanced buyback data accuracy in Roadmap 🚀
items.summary: This update backfills the ace_bought amounts and timestamps using on-chain data from Solana RPC for all 12 buyback transactions. Key entries have been added, including a new buyback on March 9, totaling 123,582.95 ACE. Additionally, placeholder timestamps have been replaced with accurate on-chain block times, improving data reliability.

items.title: Fix jobId usage for partner fetch endpoint in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update corrects the API call for fetching partner video jobs by using 'jobId' instead of 'job_id'. Additionally, it enhances the publishing process for various platforms, ensuring that drafts are now published live. Key changes include updates to the publishing steps for Zhihu, CSDN, JueJin, CNBlogs, Dev.to, and Medium.

items.title: Enhance Gemini API Streaming and Model Transform in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update addresses two critical issues in the Gemini native API handler for the OpenAI worker. It improves streaming detection by checking both query parameters and request paths, ensuring proper handling of `generateContent` and `streamGenerateContent` endpoints. Additionally, it adds model name normalization for `gemini-3.0-flash` and `gemini-3-flash`, aligning with existing configurations to prevent potential failures.

items.title: Unleashing 6 Advanced Multimodal Workflows in Dify 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces six new advanced multimodal workflow templates in the Dify platform, enhancing automation capabilities across various scenarios. Key workflows include AI-driven video production, e-commerce marketing suites, and intelligent proposal generation, all leveraging multiple AI services for streamlined processes. These templates can be easily imported and utilized, significantly improving user experience and efficiency.

items.title: Updated AceDataCloud Plugins to Align with OpenAPI Specs in Dify 🚀
items.summary: This update enhances eight AceDataCloud Dify plugins by aligning them with the latest OpenAPI specifications. Key improvements include the addition of missing parameters and models for plugins such as Suno, Seedance, Veo, and others, ensuring better functionality and user experience.

items.title: Automate Dependency Updates in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces Dependabot to automate dependency management for npm, pip, Docker, and GitHub Actions. With weekly updates for npm and pip, and monthly updates for Docker and GitHub Actions, this change enhances the project's maintenance and security posture.

items.title: Automate Dependency Updates in Nexior 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces Dependabot to automate dependency management for npm packages, Docker images, and GitHub Actions. npm packages will be updated weekly, while Docker images and GitHub Actions will receive monthly updates. This enhancement aims to keep the project dependencies up-to-date and secure.

items.title: Enhance CI with OpenAPI and Cost File Validation in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new validation script for OpenAPI specifications and cost files into the CI pipeline. The script checks for JSON syntax, OpenAPI structure, and ensures that cost files are correctly formatted and cross-referenced. This enhancement aims to catch errors before they reach the database, improving overall data integrity.

items.title: Enhance Kong Gateway Config Management in Platform Deployment 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new tool for managing Kong gateway configurations, including export, diff, and validate commands. The addition of `kong_config.py` and updates to the README facilitate tracking configurations in Git, marking a significant step towards a GitOps workflow for Kong. This tool will streamline configuration management and improve deployment processes.

items.title: Enhance CI with ESLint and Prettier Checks in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new lint job in the CI pipeline that runs ESLint and Prettier on modified TypeScript service workers. The linting process runs in parallel with the existing Docker build and is initially set to be non-blocking, allowing for gradual codebase improvements. This enhancement aims to maintain code quality and consistency across the project.

items.title: Enhance CI with Migration Check in Backend 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces a new step in the CI pipeline to check for uncommitted database migrations using the `makemigrations --check --dry-run` command. By implementing this check, we can prevent potential deployment failures caused by schema mismatches, ensuring a smoother development process.

items.title: Exciting New International Publishers Added in Publisher 🚀
items.summary: This update introduces five new international platform publishers: Hashnode, Telegraph, LinkedIn, Blogger, and WordPress. Alongside these additions, 19 existing test failures have been resolved, and 61 new tests have been implemented to ensure robust functionality across all platforms. The total number of passing tests now stands at 578, enhancing the overall reliability of the publishing system.

items.title: Enhanced Nexior Deployment Tutorials with Screenshots in Backend 🚀
items.summary: All four Nexior deployment tutorials have been enriched with CDN-hosted screenshots, enhancing the user experience. Each tutorial now features 8-10 images that cover essential steps such as GitHub Fork flow, platform login pages, and site configuration. New platform-specific screenshots have also been added for Netlify, Zeabur, Docker, and Tencent Cloud, ensuring comprehensive visual guidance.

items.title: Enhance error logging for partner video status in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update improves error handling in the getSoraPartnerVideoJob function by explicitly logging the HTTP error response status and data. Previously, only the raw error object was logged, which could obscure important debugging information. This change enhances visibility into API errors and aids in troubleshooting.
